targets.rawSql: SELECT time AS "time", alternator_key AS metric, sense_voltage_v AS value FROM masterbus_alternator_samples_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time LIMIT 10000

SELECT time AS "time", battery_key || ' voltage' AS metric, voltage_v AS value FROM masterbus_battery_samples_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, battery_key || ' current', current_a FROM masterbus_battery_samples_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 10000

WITH engines(engine_key) AS (VALUES ('port'::text), ('starboard'::text)), closed AS (SELECT engine_key, sum(duration_seconds) / 3600.0 AS runtime_hours FROM masterbus_engine_runtime_intervals_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND end_reason <> 'open' GROUP BY engine_key) SELECT e.engine_key, round(coalesce(c.runtime_hours, 0)::numeric, 2) AS runtime_hours FROM engines e LEFT JOIN closed c USING (engine_key) ORDER BY e.engine_key LIMIT 2

SELECT engine_key, started_at, start_evidence_time, start_raw_log_file_id, start_raw_line_number, source FROM masterbus_engine_runtime_intervals_v1 WHERE end_reason = 'open' AND $__timeFilter(started_at) ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT event_time, engine_key, event_type, state, evidence_time, raw_log_file_id, raw_line_number, threshold_v FROM masterbus_engine_transitions_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT device_class, device_key, max(time) AS last_seen, max(source) AS source, max(raw_log_file_id) AS raw_log_file_id FROM v_masterbus_recent_electrical_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY device_class, device_key ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 100
